_comment: Full-control guide for NoteKar remote notifications hosted at https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dheeraz101/NotekarN/refs/heads/main/notification.json. Keep notification.json valid JSON and change id whenever you want users to see a new notice.
_quick_rules: Keep notification.json valid JSON: no // comments and no trailing commas.
Change id for every new campaign. Devices remember ids to avoid repeated spam.
Use enabled:false to pause all notifications without deleting the campaign.
Use action for direct in-app destinations on Android: history, settings, whats-new, changelog, note, moment, releases.
You can also use PWA-style app URLs such as './?action=history', './?action=settings', './?action=whats-new', './?action=changelog', './?action=note', './?action=moment', or './?action=releases'.
For Android APK notices, include stable in channels. The APK currently treats itself as stable.
Use maxShows and cooldownHours to control repeat behavior per device.
Use showAfter/showUntil with timezone offsets for scheduled notices. Example: 2026-06-01T09:00:00+05:30.
Remote notices should be useful and rare: updates, release notes, migration notices, or important app messages.

_fields.enabled: Boolean. true allows this notice. false disables it immediately.
_fields.id: Required unique string. Change this for a new notification. Example: release-1-1-0 or maintenance-2026-06-01.
_fields.title: Required short notification title.
_fields.body: Required notification message. Keep it under about 120 characters when possible.
_fields.url: Tap target. Full https URLs open in browser. './' opens app/PWA home. './?action=history' style URLs open specific in-app destinations on Android and can be handled by PWA code.
_fields.action: Optional Android-first app destination. Supported: history, settings, whats-new, changelog, note, moment, releases. If action is set, Android uses it before url.
_fields.channels: Array. Use ['stable'], ['beta'], or ['stable','beta']. Android APK currently receives stable notices.
_fields.platforms: Optional array for targeting/docs. Suggested values: ['pwa','android']. Current Android ignores missing platforms and accepts the notice.
_fields.minVersion: Optional future targeting. Lowest app version that should receive this notice.
_fields.maxVersion: Optional future targeting. Highest app version that should receive this notice.
_fields.priority: Optional string: low, normal, high. Keep most notices normal.
_fields.maxShows: Number. Maximum times one device may show this id. Recommended: 1.
_fields.cooldownHours: Number. Minimum hours between repeats for this id. Use 0 only for testing.
_fields.showAfter: Optional ISO date/time. Notice will not show before this time.
_fields.showUntil: Optional ISO date/time. Notice will not show after this time.
_fields.icon: PWA optional icon path or URL. Recommended: ./icon-192.png.
_fields.debug: Optional boolean. Use true only in testing notes so you remember to remove it.

_supported_android_actions.moment: Logs a moment, respecting tap delay.

_recommended_live_notification_json.body: A new NoteKar update is ready. Tap to open GitHub Releases.

openSettings.body: Open Settings to adjust accessibility, haptics, delay, and backups.

openWhatsNew.body: See the latest improvements inside the app.

openNotePopup.body: Long press or tap this notice to save a moment with a note.

testingMode.body: This is a live notification test.
